Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger Forced Out By Board, Analysts Cheer Potential Strategy Shift: 'This Move Opens The Door'
data.description: Intel Corp (NASDAQ:INTC) CEO Pat Gelsinger announced his retirement on Monday. Reports indicate the Intel chief was forced out by Intel's board, which had grown frustrated with Gelsinger's turnaround progress.
